name: job-agent
description: Engineering infrastructure for the Job Agent MVP.

scripts.build:api: uv run python -m compileall services/api/src services/api/tests
scripts.build:ts: pnpm --filter @job-agent/contracts build && pnpm --filter @job-agent/shared build && pnpm --filter @job-agent/web build
scripts.dev:api: uv run uvicorn job_agent_api.main:app --app-dir services/api/src --reload --reload-dir services/api/src --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.format: prettier . --write && uv run ruff format services/api
scripts.format:check: prettier . --check && uv run ruff format --check services/api
scripts.lint:ts: pnpm --filter @job-agent/contracts lint && pnpm --filter @job-agent/shared lint && pnpm --filter @job-agent/web lint
scripts.test:ts: pnpm --filter @job-agent/contracts test && pnpm --filter @job-agent/shared test && pnpm --filter @job-agent/web test
scripts.typecheck:ts: pnpm --filter @job-agent/contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter @job-agent/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @job-agent/web typecheck
scripts.verify: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
